title: DeHaat is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: DeHaat is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
DeHaat invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DeHaat:
DeHaat is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DeHaat!
